violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables, beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Staff placed in sanitizer during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit (under hood) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The floors under the bread storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Refrigerator was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC to contact for service; no potentially hazardous foods to be stored in unit until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are complete lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector observed that many labels have been updated with full information. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. PIC stated contractor has been scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of how to set-up 3-bay sink. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. Inspector worked with PIC to set-up 3-bay sink during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
Hand washing sink in the kitchen is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Raw animal foods (raw whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese, bacon) in the prep unit refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Milk and cream in self-serve carafes were observed held at 48-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff, milk and cream have been in carafes for less than 4 hours. Staff placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Desserts and parfaits packaged in the food establishment are complete lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Foods without ingredients moved to behind counter for service. Labels to be updated. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Staff donned caps during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
Boxes of single service items were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap (presently has an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
